summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enterprise Knowledge Architecture features for Planet GPT. All backend APIs (23/23 tests) and frontend pages working correctly. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in publish endpoint.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/departments - Create department (admin only)
Backend: GET /api/departments - List all departments
Backend: GET /api/departments/{id} - Get department details with members
Backend: PUT /api/departments/{id} - Update department
Backend: DELETE /api/departments/{id} - Delete department
Backend: POST /api/departments/{id}/members - Add member to department
Backend: Duplicate member addition correctly rejected (400)
Backend: Non-existent department returns 404
Backend: POST /api/personal-sources/upload - Upload personal source
Backend: GET /api/personal-sources - List user's personal sources
Backend: Empty file upload correctly rejected (400)
Backend: Unsupported file type correctly rejected (400)
Backend: GET /api/sources/{id}/versions - Get source versions
Backend: Non-existent source versions returns 404
Backend: POST /api/personal-sources/{id}/publish - Publish to project
Backend: Invalid publish target correctly rejected (400)
Backend: GET /api/admin/audit-logs - Get audit logs (admin)
Backend: Audit logs filter by entity works
Backend: Audit logs filter by action works
Backend: Audit logs limit parameter works
Backend: Audit log entry structure verified
Frontend: Login with admin@admin.com / admin123
Frontend: Dashboard loads with all navigation items
Frontend: My Sources nav link visible and clickable
Frontend: Departments nav link visible and clickable
Frontend: Audit Logs nav link visible and clickable
Frontend: Departments page displays department cards
Frontend: Create Department dialog opens with inputs
Frontend: Personal Sources page displays sources with version info
Frontend: Upload button present on Personal Sources page
Frontend: Privacy info banner displayed
Frontend: Audit Logs page displays log entries
Frontend: Audit Logs filters (entity, action, level) work

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in publish endpoint
bugs_fixed.fix: Added source_doc.pop('_id', None) and new_source.pop('_id', None) after insert_one to remove MongoDB _id before returning response
bugs_fixed.details: The publish_personal_source and upload_department_source endpoints were returning 500 Internal Server Error because MongoDB's insert_one adds _id field which is not JSON serializable

critical_code_review_comments: All MongoDB insert_one operations should be followed by .pop('_id', None) to ensure JSON serialization works
seed_data_creation: Test departments and sources created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise Knowledge Architecture fully tested. Features working: Departments CRUD with member management, Personal Sources upload/list/delete, Source versioning, Publish personal source to project, Audit logs with filters. All navigation links in sidebar work correctly. Bug fixed: MongoDB ObjectId serialization in publish endpoint.
